title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
summary: Google DeepMind's SynthID is an imperceptible watermarking tool for AI-generated content that is expanding to additional partners. The watermark allows identification of synthetic content while remaining invisible to users.
